proposed_relations.description: Delivery Windows curb solution presented as part of the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Commercial Vehicle delivery zones help businesses get deliveries and reduce double parking • 10am-12pm on one side of street, 12pm-2pm on other side of street – preserves critical afternoon parking

rationale: Page 19 'Curb Solutions' is part of the same SBS presentation and presents Delivery Windows as a supporting treatment.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Commercial Vehicle delivery zones help businesses get deliveries and reduce double parking • 10am-12pm on one side of street, 12pm-2pm on other side of street – preserves critical afternoon parking

quarantine.note: The single cited block p019_c0003 contains only generic text about commercial vehicle delivery zone benefits (helping businesses, reducing double parking, preserving afternoon parking). The cited text does not mention the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project. The connection relies solely on co-occurrence in the same presentation document, which is not a relation per policy.
